display_name: Vercel Web Interface Guidelines review/audit wrapper (runtime-fetch)

break_if: upstream changes the runtime fetch URL or the skill contract
skill frontmatter name changes away from vercel-web-design-guidelines

notes: Runtime-fetch skill: the ruleset is fetched live at review time from the web-interface-guidelines repo and is intentionally NOT pinned (freshness is a feature, not drift). drift_probe covers only the local wrapper blob. Frontmatter name was prefixed vercel- (upstream shipped a bare name).
